title: lastrea mollissima
intro: Lastrea mollissima, also known as the soft polypody, is a type of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea mollissima include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Lastrea mollissima is often dried or made into a tea, and can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
